raw: {"perspective": "Scaling Engineer", "findings": [{"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "packages/swarm/archive/code_index.py", "issue": "Builder script appears to have been moved to archive but not replaced in active modules. code-index.json shows recent built_at timestamp with zero content, indicating silent failure.", "recommended_fix": "1. Restore code_index.py from archive. 2. Add healthcheck: if module count = 0 after build, fail explicitly. 3. Add to CI: validate code-index.json contains >0 endpoints pre-deploy."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: Builder script appears to have been moved to archive but not replaced in active modules. code-index.json shows recent built_at timestamp with zero content, indicating silent failure.
findings.recommended_fix: 1. Restore code_index.py from archive. 2. Add healthcheck: if module count = 0 after build, fail explicitly. 3. Add to CI: validate code-index.json contains >0 endpoints pre-deploy.
